title: neraudia angulata var. dentata
intro: Neraudia angulata var. dentata is a variety of the Neraudia angulata plant, a type of shrub or small tree native to the Pacific Islands, particularly in the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Neraudia angulata var. dentata can be utilized through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. However, it is essential to note that using any plant for medicinal purposes requires proper identification and caution, and its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
